Frontier HPC · Oak Ridge · calendar year 2023

Facility telemetry explorer

Overall coolant supply and return, their ΔT, flow, compute and total power, and PUE at 10-minute cadence across all of 2023. Drag on the chart to zoom into any window; it renders every 10-minute sample in view. The W-class panel and stats follow your selection.

Drag on the chart to zoom into a window · drag the overview to pan · double-click either to reset to the full year

ASHRAE supply-water class occupancy

Share of supply-temperature samples in each facility-water class over the selected window.

Loop ΔT vs compute power

Source. Frontier HPC facility data, ORNL, 2023, 10-min interval (Sun et al., Sci Data 11:1077, 2024; the Fig. 5 dataset in Wang et al., Applied Energy 421). ΔT is return minus supply, derived client-side; gaps in the record render as breaks. W-class bands: W17 ≤17 °C, W27 17–27, W32 27–32, W40 32–40, W45 40–45 °C.
